root_text.sn35.106:1.4: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.106:1.8: jivhañca paṭicca rase ca uppajjati jivhāviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.106:1.11: Ayaṁ dukkhassa samudayo …pe… manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ.
root_text.sn35.106:2.2: Cakkhuñca paṭicca rūpe ca uppajjati cakkhuviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.
root_text.sn35.106:2.11: jivhañca paṭicca rase ca uppajjati jivhāviññāṇaṁ …pe…
root_text.sn35.106:2.12: manañca paṭicca dhamme ca uppajjati manoviññāṇaṁ. Tiṇṇaṁ saṅgati phasso.

translation_text.sn35.106:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you the origin and disappearance of suffering.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.3: And what, mendicants, is the origin of suffering?
translation_text.sn35.106:1.4: Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.5: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.6: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.7: This is the origin of suffering …
translation_text.sn35.106:1.11: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.12: The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.13: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.14: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.106:1.15: This is the origin of suffering.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.1: And what is the disappearance of suffering?
translation_text.sn35.106:2.2: Eye consciousness arises dependent on the eye and sights. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.3: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.4: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.5: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.6: When grasping ceases, continued existence ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.7: When continued existence ceases, rebirth ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.8: When rebirth ceases, old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress cease.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.9: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.10: This is the disappearance of suffering. …
translation_text.sn35.106:2.12: Mind consciousness arises dependent on the mind and ideas. The meeting of the three is contact.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.13: Contact is a requirement for feeling.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.14: Feeling is a requirement for craving.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.15: When that craving fades away and ceases with nothing left over, grasping ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.16: When grasping ceases, continued existence ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.17: When continued existence ceases, rebirth ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.18: When rebirth ceases, old age and death, sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress cease.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.19: That is how this entire mass of suffering ceases.
translation_text.sn35.106:2.20: This is the disappearance of suffering.”
